body_txt: Babysitting is a well-known hobby or business that one, especially a young female, can do to sit with a child or children while the parent or parents are away or otherwise occupied. Unfortunately, a babysitter isn't always available, and in desperate times (or out of just plain apathy), the decision to choose whomever or whatever happens. It could be someone who is not suitable for sitting with children because of their checkered past, their own lack of time/interest/experience or otherwise being a poor fit. Perhaps it's a radical alternative in the form of a barely much older than the child choice, say an older sibling who should be watched themselves, a pet (which, for obvious reasons, doesn't work), or even the TV. Perhaps the parent or guardian has no choice but to bring the child with them wherever they're going, which may or may not work depending on their environment or where they'll be (e.g., an office job may be a bit safer than a construction job). Simply leaving the (usually minor) child alone happens too, but is generally frowned upon (as well as against the law) due to it being dangerous for the child. Whatever the case, it could be Played for Laughs , Played for Drama or even Played for Horror . One of the reasons for this trope is because the child or children in question is a Babysitter's Nightmare , who has scared off so many babysitters with their behavior that none of them are willing to look after the child or children a second time. Related to "Take Your Child to Work Day" Plot . Free-Range Children could be an end result of this. Due to the trope's potential for gossip and complaining, real-life examples (unless discussed within a program or production itself) are forbidden . No Real Life Examples, Please!
